overall.description: A cinematic walk through a sunlit luxury residential neighborhood in a game engine, featuring Mediterranean-style homes, palm-lined streets, and a distant modern skyline. The camera descends hillside roads, crosses an intersection with passing vehicles, and continues along sidewalks past manicured hedges and tennis courts during golden hour.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit hillside residential street with a prominent white Mediterranean-style house on the left. The camera walks downhill past curved white retaining walls, with a distant modern glass tower visible against the blue sky. A white sports car drives past on the right as palm trees cast long shadows across the asphalt.

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a residential intersection marked with a painted stop sign. Crossing the street, the view opens to show a brown brick building on the right while vehicles including a black sports car and grey sedan drive through. The modern tower shifts to the left as the camera navigates the crosswalk.

segments.scene_description: Moving onto the sidewalk, the camera passes by tall green hedge walls that screen private residences. A chain-link fence marking tennis courts becomes visible on the right, while the path continues past a yellow fire hydrant. The environment remains quiet with no pedestrians present.

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues along the sidewalk with a wooden fence and vine-covered wall on the left. The tennis court fence remains visible on the right as the camera approaches a pedestrian wearing a yellow shirt walking ahead. The warm golden hour light continues to illuminate the palm-lined residential street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sunlit hillside descent through a residential intersection and along a quiet, manicured sidewalk. It begins by walking downhill past a white Mediterranean-style house and curved retaining walls, with a distant glass tower punctuating the blue sky as a white sports car drives past. As the camera reaches a residential intersection, the view opens to reveal a brown brick building and passing traffic, including a black sports car and grey sedan, while the modern tower shifts in the periphery. The scene then transitions onto a sidewalk lined with tall green hedges and a yellow fire hydrant, passing a chain-link fence that reveals tennis courts on the right. Finally, the path continues past a vine-covered wall and wooden fence under warm golden hour light, moving toward a pedestrian in a yellow shirt walking ahead.
